message:
🐛 fix: rename navbar "AI" button to "Agent" for kc-agent connection clarity (#8193) (#8209)

The navbar status pill previously rendered the connected-state label as
"AI", which users mistook for an LLM/AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic,
etc.) status. The button actually represents the kc-agent WebSocket
connection between the Console UI and the user's local kubeconfig.

Renames the connected-state label to "Agent" and updates the connected/
connecting/disconnected tooltips to explicitly reference kc-agent and
the local kubeconfig. The "Offline" and "Demo" labels are unchanged
(they're already unambiguous), and no variable, key, prop, CSS class,
or data-testid is renamed — only the displayed text and tooltip strings.

Fixes #8193

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-    "aiLabel": "AI",
+    "aiLabel": "Agent",
     "liveLabel": "Live",
     "liveMode": "Live mode — agent connected, AI disabled",
     "noneAgent": "None",
